readings.summary: Who can know the will of God?

readings.citation:
Ps 90:3-4, 5-6, 12-13, 14-17, R. v.1
In every age, O Lord, you have been our refuge.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 90:3-4, 5-6, 12-13, 14-17, R. v.1
In every age, O Lord, you have been our refuge.

readings.summary: Paul sends Onesimus,erly a slave, back to Philemon as a brother.

Let your face shine upon your servant;
and teach me your laws.
Disciples must carry their own cross.

antiphons.text:
You are just, O Lord, and your judgment is right;
treat your servant in accord with your merciful love.
